title: Graph slug collisions (derived audit artifact)
description: Derived audit sidecar for the knowledge graph: records the cross-registry component slug collisions where one slug appears in more than one kit with distinct Figma keys and is silently tie-broken (first-wins) into a single graph node. Regenerated by scripts/graph/derive-graph.js from the registries; makes the otherwise-silent identity drop legible. Do not edit by hand.

_meta.description: Auto-generation provenance marker. Signals that this file is derived from the registries by the graph deriver; do not edit by hand.

examples.do_not_edit: Regenerated by CI from the registries; edit the source, not this file.

slug_collisions.description: One entry per slug that collides across registries with distinct Figma keys, sorted by slug. Empty when no cross-registry key collisions exist.

slug.description: The colliding component slug (shared across more than one kit).

resolved_to.description: The kit whose entry won the first-wins tie-break and became the single graph node (REGISTRY_FILES order; dskit first).

candidates.description: Every registry entry that carried this slug, in registry order; the first is the winner recorded in resolved_to.

kit.description: The registry (kit) this candidate came from.

key.description: The candidate's stable Figma component key (the disambiguator that distinguishes it from the other candidates).
